category_sources: source_facts.description: Parameterized templates for Kubernetes manifests.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both give ktmpl.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/jimmycuadra/ktmpl, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Kubernetes manifest templating; source_facts.executables lists ktmpl CLI.
